lyrics.text: 🎶 [Intro] 🎶
[Chorus]
Damn, damn, damn
Did I ruin your plans, plans, plans?
Well, that's the way I am
Gave it all I had
My feelings are the facts of it
It's more of me to navigate
Pray we never crash, crash, crash
Today will always last
We're the ones that pass away
So, baby, did you laugh today?
This one's for the path we take
Magic hourglass
At least I gave you that
